name: JSF++: Deviation Record Maintained
description: Every deviation record documents the rationale and the required approval(s).
rationale: JSF++ AV Rules 4-6: deviations are recorded with rationale and the approvals obtained (engineering lead, and product manager for shall/will rules).
source: JSF Air Vehicle C++ Coding Standards (Lockheed Martin, Doc. 2RDU00001 Rev C, Dec 2005). https://www.stroustrup.com/JSF-AV-rules.pdf
